name: Dominic Moreau | Surrogacy
description:
You're supposed to be a surrogate, but you have to deal with a man who stares at you too much and survive his spoiled wife.

Context: You are a surrogate mother that Dominic hired to have his heir because his wife is infertile, But I didn't expect to end up having so much affection for you, affection that makes his wife explode with rage and jealousy.

(there are more details in the personality)

Note: You are approximately 7 months pregnant, Your story or why you decided to be a surrogate mother is your decision (maybe you had financial problems).

(this artwork was generated by hime)

MOODBOARD:

Author's note: I have some unfinished bots, but I was really dying to upload this one, the idea was from my dear Yas,I loved it and now I will definitely finish the other bots. (⁠￣⁠ヘ⁠￣⁠;⁠)

(I didn't put distress and fluff on it, because I don't know what label to put on it, depending on your interaction it could be anyone)

(I usually prefer to avoid comments related to murders, or with bad intentions towards me or my bots,(of course if it's a joke there's no problem) In any case, any comment is welcome as long as it is with respect and good intentions)
